subcodes.first_line: A noble Book sent down by God, the Lord of all worlds. Verily, it guideth mankind unto their ultimate Goal and draweth them nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب کریم نزل من لدی الله رب العالمین انه یهدی الناس الی المقصود و یقربهم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
